features: COMPATIBILITY: Designed for use with Phone and other USB-powered devices, providing reliable charging through a single USB port
POWER OUTPUT: Features 1 Amp (1000mAh) power delivery for efficient charging of mobile devices
UK STANDARD: Equipped with a sturdy 3-pin British plug design conforming to UK socket standards
COMPACT DESIGN: Space-saving, lightweight construction in classic white colour makes it perfect for home or travel use
SAFETY FEATURES: Built with protective mechanisms including short circuit and overload protection for secure charging
description: Keep your Phone powered up with this reliable USB wall charging adapter featuring the standard UK 3-pin plug design. The compact, white adapter delivers a steady 1 amp (1000mAh) charging current through its single USB port, making it perfect for everyday charging needs. The sleek and minimalist housing is crafted from durable materials, while the metal pins ensure stable connection to your wall socket. Its portable size makes it ideal for use at home, office, or during travel within the UK. The USB port is universally compatible with charging cables for Phones and other USB-powered devices. The adapter's thoughtful design includes safety features to protect your devices during charging. Whether you need a replacement charger or an extra one for convenience, this adapter offers reliable performance for keeping your Phone's battery topped up.
